[[Category:Scenetics]]
[[sn:Sceneplex]][[Category:MGS-plexes]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Sceneplex]]A Sceneplex is a complex of [[scenes]] that come together. These can include things like being abused, or being a member of a religion
==See Also==
* [[memeplex]]
* [[geneplex]]
[[Category:Pages]]
